summary:
KEY FUNCTIONALITY:
- Integration with Hadoop 3.3.2+ Auditing
- Update common context with job ID and task attempt ID
- Enter and exit stages
- Update thread context with stage name and job ID

CORE LOGIC:
- Update common context with job ID and task attempt ID
- Enter and exit stages
- Update thread context with stage name and job ID

INPUTS/OUTPUTS:
- None

DEPENDENCIES:
- org.apache.hadoop.classification.InterfaceAudience
- org.apache.hadoop.fs.audit.CommonAuditContext
- org.apache.hadoop.mapreduce.lib.output.committer.manifest.ManifestCommitterConfig
- org.apache.hadoop.fs.audit.AuditConstants.PARAM_JOB_ID
- org.apache.hadoop.mapreduce.lib.output.committer.manifest.ManifestCommitterConstants.CONTEXT_ATTR_STAGE
- org.apache.hadoop.mapreduce.lib.output.committer.manifest.ManifestCommitterConstants.CONTEXT_ATTR_TASK_ATTEMPT_ID

KEY FUNCTIONALITY: Abort a task by deleting the task directory.
CORE LOGIC: Delete the task attempt directory.
INPUTS/OUTPUTS: The task attempt directory.
DEPENDENCIES: None.

KEY FUNCTIONALITY:
The main purpose of this chunk is to clean up a job's temporary directory through parallel delete, base _temporary delete.

CORE LOGIC:
The key algorithms or processing patterns visible in this chunk are the parallel deletion of task attempt directories and the deletion of the base directory.

INPUTS/OUTPUTS:
The data flowing in and out of this chunk is the job's temporary directory.

DEPENDENCIES:
The key imported, parent, or collaborator classes visible in this chunk are the CleanupJobStage, StageConfig, AbstractJobOrTaskStage, and other classes from the same package.

KEY FUNCTIONALITY: Save the _SUCCESS file to the destination directory via a temp file in the job attempt dir.
CORE LOGIC: Returns the path of the file.
INPUTS/OUTPUTS: successData (success data to save), successFile (path of the file to save), successTempFile (path of the temp file to save to).
DEPENDENCIES: StageConfig, OP_STAGE_JOB_COMMIT, OP_STAGE_JOB_SAVE_SUCCESS, OP_SAVE_SUMMARY_FILE.

KEY FUNCTIONALITY:
The main purpose of this chunk of code is to set up a job by creating the job attempt directory.

CORE LOGIC:
The key algorithm or processing pattern visible in this chunk is the creation of the job attempt directory.

INPUTS/OUTPUTS:
The data flowing in is the deleteMarker boolean, which indicates whether any success marker should be deleted.
The data flowing out is the job attempt directory path.

DEPENDENCIES:
The key imported, parent, or collaborator classes visible in this chunk are:
- org.apache.hadoop.mapreduce.lib.output.committer.manifest.stages.AbstractJobOrTaskStage
- org.apache.hadoop.fs.Path
- org.slf4j.Logger
- org.slf4j.LoggerFactory
- org.apache.hadoop.fs.statistics.StoreStatisticNames.OP_DELETE
- org.apache.hadoop.mapreduce.lib.output.committer.manifest.ManifestCommitterStatisticNames.OP_STAGE_JOB_SETUP

KEY FUNCTIONALITY:
The main purpose of this chunk of code is to set up a task in the Apache Hadoop MapReduce framework.

CORE LOGIC:
The key algorithm or processing pattern visible in this chunk is the creation of the task attempt directory. This directory is created after verifying that the job attempt directory exists.

INPUTS/OUTPUTS:
The data flowing in is the task name, and the data flowing out is the task attempt directory.

DEPENDENCIES:
The key imported, parent, or collaborator classes visible in this chunk are the Apache Hadoop classes related to MapReduce, such as Path, IOException, and StageConfig.
